name: Stale Data Archiver
description: Move old, infrequently-accessed records to archive tables to keep your primary tables lean and fast. Configurable retention period and archival strategy.
author: platform

config.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS count FROM execution_steps WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
WITH archived AS (DELETE FROM execution_steps WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' RETURNING *) INSERT INTO execution_steps_archive SELECT * FROM archived

config.subject: Monthly Archive Complete: {{nodes.node-2.data.rows[0].count}} records archived
config.html:
Monthly Data Archival Complete

Archived {{nodes.node-2.data.rows[0].count}} records from execution_steps (older than 90 days) to execution_steps_archive.
